entities.name: CHISEL DIGGER
entities.description: A tool designed and developed for harvesting groundnut, consisting of a digger-bottom and a standard with chisel points for soil penetration

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Virginia bunch type groundnut crops targeted for harvesting

entities.name: ICRISAT ASIA CENTER
entities.description: The facility where the chisel digger was designed and developed

entities.name: OXEN
entities.description: Animals used to pull a single digger-bottom attached to a draw pole

entities.name: TRACTOR
entities.description: A vehicle used to pull two or more digger-bottoms attached to a tool bar

entities.name: SOIL CONDITIONS
entities.description: The state of the soil which affects the penetration depth of harvesting tools

entities.name: BLADE TYPE DIGGER
entities.description: A harvesting tool that may fail to penetrate soil to the desired depth compared to the chisel digger

relationships.description: performs better than in certain soil conditions
